name: Instagram Downloader
desc: A robust web application to easily download your favorite Instagram content like reels and photos in seconds.

name: Live Weather
desc: Live Weather is a responsive weather web application that provides real-time weather for any city. Fetch live data from a public Weather API.

name: Tossify
desc: Tossify is a simple web application that simulates a coin toss. User can click a button to randomly generates heads or tails.

name: GrowthX
desc: Developed a responsive SIP and Lumpsum Mutual Fund calculator to help users visualize long-term wealth creation through compounding.

name: Zestora
desc: Zestora is a full-stack MERN eCommerce application featuring product listings, secure authentication, and robust cart functionality.

name: All-Movies
desc: All-Movies is a full-stack MERN application for browsing and discovering movies.

name: Resume Maker
desc: A real-time interactive resume builder with a live preview system, structured sections, and a sleek modern interface.

name: Medical AI Assistant
desc: A comprehensive medical AI assistant providing intelligent symptom checking and tailored health advice.

name: Magnet Voice Assistant
desc: An advanced, high-tech AI voice assistant featuring dynamic interactive capabilities.
